account.title: Your workspace
account.description: Manage your identity, sign-in, and how ResearchMind keeps your research data.
account.local_data_copy: PDFs, library items, chats, and vectors are stored locally. Your account only manages identity and sign-in sessions.
account.profile_copy: Display information for your ResearchMind account.
account.security_copy: Control how your account can be accessed.
account.name_update_failed: Unable to update your name. Please try again.
account.reset_failed: Unable to send a password-reset email.
account.copy_failed: Unable to copy the account ID.

auth.visual_copy: Save ideas, test arguments, and turn documents into your own understanding.
auth.continue_local_hint: No account needed. Your research and documents stay local.
auth.optional_sign_in_hint: Use an account when you need one
auth.enter_email_first: Enter your email first to receive a password-reset link.
auth.reset_sent: A password-reset link was sent to your email.
auth.backend_unavailable: You are signed in, but the secure backend is unavailable.
auth.error_secure_session: Unable to get a secure sign-in session.
auth.error_invalid_credential: The email or password is incorrect.
auth.error_weak_password: Password must contain at least 6 characters.
auth.error_popup_blocked: Google sign-in window could not open. Try the web app or use email and password.
auth.error_unauthorized_domain: This domain is not authorized in Firebase Authentication.
auth.error_provider_disabled: This sign-in method is not enabled in Firebase Console.
auth.error_api_key: VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY is invalid or belongs to another Firebase project.
auth.error_app_unauthorized: This application is not authorized to use Firebase Authentication.
auth.error_network: Unable to connect to Firebase. Check your network or firewall.
auth.error_storage: The browser blocked storage needed for Google sign-in. Use email/password or allow storage for this app.
auth.error_environment: Google sign-in is not supported in this environment. Use email and password.
auth.error_account_provider: This email already uses a different sign-in method. Use the original method.
auth.guest_hint: Work locally. Sign in to sync.
auth.error_generic: Unable to authenticate{{code}}. Please try again.

projects.title: Research projects
projects.empty_description: Create a project to connect sources, reading notes, evidence, chat, and review.
projects.question_placeholder: What question should this project answer?
projects.no_evidence_hint: Open a source and save a quote or note. It will appear here.
projects.audit_empty: No screening or evidence activity yet.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Control where research data is processed and what stays on this device.
privacy.local_first_desc: Papers, annotations, projects, search indexes and diagnostic logs remain on this device.
privacy.cloud_ai_desc: When disabled, ResearchMind switches to the configured local model.
privacy.redact_metadata_desc: Remove avoidable document metadata from cloud-bound context.
privacy.diagnostics_desc: Consent is stored locally. Logs are never uploaded automatically.
privacy.data_control_desc: Create verified backups or export portable research data without API keys.
privacy.restore_confirm: Restore {name} on the next restart? A recovery copy of the current database will be kept.
privacy.restore_queued: Backup verified. Restart ResearchMind to apply it.
privacy.restore_error: This backup could not be restored.

command.title: Command palette
command.placeholder: Search papers or go to a workspace…

settings.title: Settings
settings.confirm_clear_cache: Clear the LLM and Embedding cache? The system will need to call the AI model/API again on the next run.
settings.zotero_data_dir_placeholder: Path to Zotero data directory (contains zotero.sqlite)...
settings.query_instruction_placeholder: Example: Represent this question for document retrieval:
settings.section_general_desc: Foundation settings to keep ResearchMind stable and verifiable.
settings.section_diagnostics_desc: System status, maintenance, onboarding and support reports.
settings.section_ai_desc: Choose the right AI model to produce evidence-backed results with clear citations.
settings.section_data_desc: Storage directory, Zotero, cache and system resources.
settings.section_advanced_desc: Provider routing by task, embedding, reranker and statistics.
settings.theme_desc: Light, dark or follow system — AI interface with teal accent.
settings.help_desc: Detailed documentation in Help Center — doesn't take up the main sidebar.
settings.diag_desc: Monitor backend health, indexes and memory in real-time.
settings.diag_load_error: Cannot load diagnostics data. Check backend and try again.
settings.reliability_window: Operational quality over the last {days} days
settings.reliability_issue_indexed_without_chunks: {count} indexed papers have no searchable chunks
settings.reliability_issue_unmapped_citations: {count} citations could not be mapped to a paper
settings.ai_control_cancelled_detail: Partial answers are not stored or cached
settings.ai_control_budget_active: Stop new uncached chat requests after approximately {count} tokens. Use Save AI Configuration to apply.
settings.ai_control_budget_unlimited: 0 means unlimited. Cached answers remain available.
settings.ai_quality_method: Deterministic offline evaluation of stored answers; no paid model calls.
settings.maintenance_desc: Safe operations to fix slow search or stale cache.
settings.onboarding_desc: Re-run initial guide or AI setup wizard.
settings.ai_desc: Choose how AI operates. You can change anytime.
settings.ai_cloud_custom_desc: Your own Gemini, DeepSeek or Claude API
settings.data_storage_desc: Stores SQLite database, vector ChromaDB and imported PDF documents.
settings.data_zotero_desc: Auto-sync documents and PDFs from your local Zotero data directory.
settings.data_cache_desc: Stores Embedding and LLM results for fast retrieval (<5ms).
settings.data_resource_desc: Auto-release local AI model RAM/VRAM after 5 minutes of idle.
settings.advanced_provider_desc: Configure AI provider for each task. Auto-fallback on error.
settings.advanced_data_local: All data stays on your machine. Not sent outside without permission.
settings.advanced_model_router_desc: Auto-switch to large-context model when token threshold is exceeded.
settings.api_key_saved_locally: API key is stored on your machine, not sent anywhere.
settings.token_saved_locally: Token is stored on your machine, not sent anywhere.
settings.github_permissions_hint: Requires AI Models (Read-only) permission in Account permissions.
settings.diag_wizard_unavailable: Cannot open Setup Wizard from here.
settings.zotero_select_error: Cannot open folder picker. Please enter manually.
settings.storage_moving: Moving data (please do not close the app)...
settings.wizard_confirm: Re-run the AI setup wizard? Current settings will be kept.
settings.fts_rebuild_confirm: Rebuild FTS index from chunks table? This is safe but may take a few seconds with a large library.
settings.data_clear_confirm:
WARNING: This will delete ALL imported PDF documents, chat history, notes and vector database. Your configuration and API keys will be KEPT.

Are you sure you want to continue?
settings.data_reset_confirm:
DANGER WARNING: This will COMPLETELY DELETE your configuration, API keys, PDF documents, chat history and vector database. The app will return to its initial state.

Are you sure you want to reset the entire application?
settings.change_storage_confirm:
Are you sure you want to move all existing data to the new folder?

DANGER: Target disk space is low (< 10GB). Are you sure you want to continue?
settings.move_storage_confirm:
Move all existing data to the new folder:
{path}

Target disk space: {free_gb} GB free.

Are you sure you want to move?
settings.move_storage_confirm_warning:
Move all existing data to the new folder:
{path}

Target disk space: {free_gb} GB free.

WARNING: Target disk space is low (< 10GB). Are you sure you want to continue?

chat.review_mode: Summarize these papers for me in this structure: Background, Related Work, Methods, Key Findings, Research Gaps, and Insights.
chat.critique_mode: Critique these papers for me: list incorrect or unsound assumptions, missing data, methodological limitations, overclaiming risks, and 3 improvement suggestions.
chat.debate_mode: Create a debate between two AIs (AI A and AI B) on a topic related to these papers. Each side presents arguments and rebuttals with citations and a brief conclusion. Finally, provide 3 verification proposals.
chat.verify_mode: Verify the research results in these papers against external academic data.
chat.placeholder_current: Ask a question to get evidence-based answers from the paper...
chat.placeholder_external: Ask about research outside the library...
chat.no_papers_selected:
**No papers selected!**

**Current Paper** mode requires you to select at least 1 paper from the library first.

Switch to **Entire Library** to ask about everything, or go back to the library to select papers.
chat.no_collection: **No collection selected.** Create or select a collection/project before chatting in this scope.
chat.no_collection_quick: **No collection selected.** Create or select a collection/project first.
chat.no_papers_quick:
**No papers selected!**

**Current Paper** mode requires you to select at least 1 paper from the library first.
chat.empty_desc: Select your paper, ask a research question, and get answers with citations you can verify.
chat.strict_on_title: ON: Model only responds when evidence is found in documents
chat.strict_off_title: OFF: Model can use general knowledge to answer
chat.mode_deep_desc: Deep reasoning with DeepSeek V4 Flash
chat.paper_picker_empty_library: No papers in the library yet.
chat.no_paper_hint: No paper selected to generate evidence-based answers.
chat.import_prompt: No papers in the library yet.
chat.toast_clipboard_empty: Clipboard is empty or contains no text.
chat.toast_clipboard_error: Cannot read clipboard. Please grant permission.
chat.toast_verify_refresh: Cache cleared for {doi}. Re-submit your query to refresh data.
chat.toast_uncited_claims: {count} claims missing sources. See Trust Report.
chat.toast_find_sources: Auto source finding will be available in a future update.
chat.toast_keep_cited: Filter claims to keep only cited evidence will be available in a future update.
chat.toast_export_claim: Export verification report will be available in a future update.
chat.toast_export_report_error: Report export failed. Please check the backend connection.
chat.deep_research_need_question: Enter a question before using Deep Research.
chat.quick_summary_query: Summarize the main ideas of this paper
chat.quick_verify_query: Verify the research results in these papers against external academic data
chat.quick_debate_query: Create AI debate: pro and con arguments on key points
chat.quick_related_query: Find related research on the topic of this paper
chat.quick_insight_query: Analyze research gaps, strengths, weaknesses, and future directions
chat.error_backend_not_running:
Error: {err}

> Ensure the FastAPI backend is running: `cd backend && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8765`

startup.connecting_backend: Connecting to backend... (run `uvicorn main:app --port 8765` or `pnpm tauri:external`)
startup.backend_timeout: Backend unresponsive after 4 minutes. First launch may need 1–3 minutes to extract the AI engine.
startup.web_dev_hint: If running the web/dev version, start FastAPI or launch the app via Tauri.

verify.full: Verified against OpenAlex, Crossref & Semantic Scholar
verify.partial: Partially verified — some databases did not respond
verify.local_only: Insufficient external academic evidence to cross-reference this claim.
verify.cache_cleared: Cache cleared. Re-submit your question to refresh.

discovery.title: Academic Discovery
discovery.description: Search papers from OpenAlex and Semantic Scholar
discovery.search_placeholder: Enter a research question, e.g. 'machine learning for drug discovery'...
discovery.no_results: No results found. Try different keywords.
discovery.empty_instruction: Enter a research question to discover papers from academic databases.
discovery.toast_translate_error: Cannot translate. Please check the Gemini API key in .env
discovery.toast_pdf_not_found: No PDF file found for this paper on the system.
discovery.strategy_save_error: Could not save this search strategy.

daily_reader.empty_library_hint: Import your first PDF to start your research journey!
daily_reader.error_loading: Cannot load data. Ensure the backend is running.
daily_reader.loading: AI is analyzing and preparing suggestions for you...

personal_brain.hero_desc: Analyze your research trends and reading preferences
personal_brain.interests_empty: Add tags to papers or start chatting for AI to analyze your interests.
personal_brain.error_loading: Cannot load data. Ensure the backend is running.

evidence.title: Comparison Matrix
evidence.description: Compare evidence across papers to verify claims, quotes, and confidence levels.
evidence.select_min: Select at least 2 papers to compare
evidence.empty_library: No papers in the library yet...
evidence.no_drafts: No drafts yet. Create a comparison matrix to get started.

toast.free_30_limit: Free daily 30/30 requests used. Try again tomorrow or switch Local AI mode in Settings.

welcome_tour.body_library: Manage papers, PDFs, highlights and semantic search — the starting point for every research workflow.
welcome_tour.body_chat: Ask AI questions based on your selected papers. Every important conclusion should have a citation for quick verification.
welcome_tour.body_review: Insights, screening, review builder and evidence matrix to turn papers into verifiable results.
welcome_tour.body_labs: Deep analysis, personal brain, daily reader and paper relationship graph.
welcome_tour.body_help: Click ? in the top right corner to open Help Center, documentation and shortcuts anytime.

import.error_csv: Could not import the CSV file.
import.error_folder: Could not import the selected folder.
import.dropzone_text: Drag and drop files here, or

import.zotero_desc: Select a .csv file exported from Zotero
import.zotero_dir_hint: Path to Zotero directory (usually contains a storage folder)
import.zotero_auto_find: Auto-find and import PDF files from Zotero storage
import.zotero_needs_dir: You need to enter the Zotero data directory to find PDFs
import.zotero_export_guide: How to export: Zotero → Select collection → File → Export Library... → Format: CSV
import.zotero_pdf_note: • PDFs will be automatically found and indexed
import.ocr_processing: Performing OCR on images (first time may take several minutes)...
import.pdf_not_found_title: PDF not found in Zotero storage
import.pdf_scanned_title: PDF may be scanned, needs OCR

insights.select_min_two: Please select at least 2 documents to proceed with comparison.
insights.gap_desc: Find research gaps — areas where no one has done well
insights.conflict_desc: Detect contradictions between papers in the library
insights.topic_desc: AI suggests research topics based on your library
insights.evolution_desc: See how research ideas evolve over time
insights.matrix_desc: Compare objectives, methods, results, and limitations across papers
insights.select_prompt_generic: Please select at least 2 papers from the list below to compare
insights.select_prompt_all: Select papers to analyze (or leave empty = all {n} papers)
insights.no_papers: No papers indexed yet. Import PDFs first.

review_source.empty: Generate a section to see sources

wow.dropzone_title: Drag and drop PDF files here
wow.dropzone_text: or click to browse files from your computer
wow.library_papers: Or select documents from your library
wow.hint_drop: Drop a PDF here for instant AI analysis
wow.pending_click: Click the analyze button to start summarizing
wow.pending_wait: Waiting for previous step to complete...
wow.index_timeout: Paper processing timed out. Please try again later.
wow.vectorizing: Vectorizing text (this may take a few seconds)...
wow.extract_timeout: Document processing took longer than expected. Please check in the Library.
wow.prompt_summary: Summarize this paper concisely: background, methods, key findings, conclusion. Reply in English.
wow.prompt_critique: Critically analyze this paper: strengths, weaknesses, methodological limitations, and improvement suggestions. Reply in English.
wow.prompt_conflict: Analyze conflicts in this paper: contradictory results, differing viewpoints from prior research. Reply in English.
wow.prompt_gap: Analyze research gaps from this paper: unresolved issues, future research directions. Reply in English.
wow.prompt_debate: Create an AI debate about this paper: pro vs con perspectives, highlighting strengths and limitations. Reply in English.

library_view.no_doc_text: Select a document to view its details.
library_view.summary_tab_info: AI summary generated from indexed document excerpts.
library_view.toast_export_docx_error: Could not export the DOCX file.
library_view.toast_export_html_error: Could not export the HTML file.
library_view.toast_ocr_error: Could not run OCR for this document.
library_view.title: Library
library_view.confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
library_view.toast_ocr_queued: OCR queued. Please check back later.
library_view.toast_zotero_sync: Zotero sync successful! {imported} new documents added, {pdf} PDFs copied. Skipped {duplicates} duplicates.
library_view.no_related_hint: Import more papers to expand the knowledge network.
library_view.highlights_empty_hint: Press "Reanalyze" for AI to analyze the paper content.

highlights.bulk_label: Select highlights to add to Chat:
highlights.no_evidence_text: Extract key findings, methods, limitations, and contributions from this paper using AI.
highlights.gen_summary_desc: AI generates a summary of the selected highlights
highlights.gen_debate_desc: Examine the paper's arguments from multiple perspectives
highlights.gen_gap_desc: Identify evidence gaps and promising research directions
highlights.gen_review_desc: Create a concise literature review from the paper
highlights.no_doc_text: Please select a document from the left sidebar to view key highlights.
highlights.analyzing_progress: AI is analyzing the paper to extract key points...
highlights.prompt_detailed_summary: Provide a detailed summary of this document: objectives, methods, key results, and conclusions.
highlights.prompt_debate: Analyze the key arguments in this document from multiple perspectives.
highlights.prompt_lit_review: Write a short literature review based on this document: context, main contributions, future directions.

review_builder.confirm_restore_version: Restore this version? The current version will be saved in version history.
review_builder.error_matrix_min: At least 2 documents are required to create a comparison matrix.
review_builder.toast_quality_ok: No issues found. Quality looks good.
review_builder.issue_add_citation: Opened source panel - add citations from evidence on the right.
review_builder.issue_trim_content: Open the section to trim content.
review_builder.issue_expand_content: Regenerating the section with expanded content.
review_builder.generated_by: Review created by ResearchMind following an evidence-first approach (prioritizing verifiable conclusions).

screening.title: Paper Screening
screening.desc: Include / Exclude / Unsure to select papers for a systematic review
screening.empty_hint: No papers yet. Import papers into the library first.
screening.save_error: Could not save this screening decision.
screening.reason_required: Enter an exclusion reason before saving.

search.hero_desc: Intelligent semantic search across your entire PDF library
search.placeholder: Semantic search... e.g. "5G network latency evaluation methods"
search.suggest_main_ideas: Summarize the main ideas in the library
search.suggest_key_contributions: Summarize the main contributions of the papers
search.suggest_strengths_weaknesses: Strengths and weaknesses of the methods
search.no_results_desc: Try different keywords or import more PDFs into the library.

graph.title: Knowledge Graph
graph.strategy_local_desc: Entity-based: query → entity → neighbors → context → LLM
graph.strategy_global_desc: Map-reduce: community reports → local answers → synthesis
graph.strategy_drift_desc: Iterative: start local → extract entities → explore → collapse
graph.empty_text: Press "Build Graph" to extract entities and relations from paper chunks.
graph.empty_hint: This process calls an LLM to analyze each chunk and build a structured knowledge graph.
graph.graph_hint: Click a node to view details · Double-click to fit view
graph.graph_empty: No graph data to display. Entities may have been extracted but no relations exist.
graph.query_placeholder: Ask a question about your research knowledge graph...

scan.no_folder: No folders added. Please add a folder first.

pdf.no_annotations: No notes yet. Add a quote or observation while you read.
pdf.quote_placeholder: Paste or type the passage you want to cite…

folder.empty_hint: Click "Select Folder" to add folders for indexing.

review_editor.hint_generate: Press "Regenerate" to create content for this section

setup.llama_server_hint: Make sure llama-server.exe is running at {{url}}
setup.welcome_desc: Evidence-First Research Platform: turn papers into verifiable answers and reviews.

license.title: License & plan
license.description: Your license is verified offline and stored in the operating system's secure storage.
license.placeholder: Paste the license token sent after payment
license.activated: The license has been activated on this device.
license.status_error: Could not read the license status.

publishing.title: Publishing Engine & Format Auditor Pro
publishing.subtitle: Check manuscript against venue guidelines (IEEE, Springer, Nature, ACM, Elsevier, APA) & Auto Fix + Export.
publishing.content_placeholder: Paste manuscript or literature review text here to audit format compliance...
publishing.placeholder_text: Click "Audit Venue Rules Pro" to get Category scores, error line locations, publisher guideline reasons, and Auto Fix buttons.
